text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out shopping...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Symboli Rudolf coming out of a nearby
shop and call out to her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, isn't this a coincidence. Doing some
shopping too, are you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I just finished placing an order for towels and am
about to head over to my next destination.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to increase the inventory of towels that
the student council lends out to students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's forecast to storm all next week, and there's
sure to be an increase in students who need
towels, thus the preemptive restock.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once I finish ordering extra umbrellas and rain
gear, we'll be fully prepared for whatever may
come.
choice_data_list: Thanks! Now no storm will rain on our parade.
Thanks! Now no storm will rain on our parade.

It must be tough always looking out for the
school.

It must be tough always looking out for the
school.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Once I finish ordering extra umbrellas and rain
gear, we'll be fully prepared for whatever may
come.
choice_data_list: Thanks! Now no storm will rain on our parade.
Thanks! Now no storm will rain on our parade.

It must be tough always looking out for the
school.

It must be tough always looking out for the
school.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. Feel free to be more generous with
your compliments. They'll help encourage me to
work with true altruism.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I wish to make the academy a place where all
students can pursue their dreams wholeheartedly,
rain or shine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If you have any requests of any sort, please do
not hesitate to ask me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's nothing. I was already in the area on student
council business, so I decided to kill two birds
with one stone.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I have the duty of improving the training
conditions for everyone, so it's only natural that I
do all this.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I need to make sure the drainage on the track is
adequate once I'm finished ordering everything...
I'd best hurry. No time to waste.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I have a lot to learn from how
responsible and proactive Symboli Rudolf is.
